atomicity.message: VORCH-06 commit auto-discovery and legacy compatibility changes are one feature slice.

conditions.message: Prior mechanical verdict remains valid for the new staged hash; the blocker fix is formatted, diff-check clean, and strengthens bound evidence validation.
evidence: ScarletMarsh 2760 regenerated verifier prompts for sha256:74c4... and confirmed the same five staged files with no hash-excluded payload.
ScarletMarsh 2760 ran focused internal and cmd/e2e tests in an isolated staged-slice worktree; all passed.

conditions.message: Prior dry verdict remains valid on the fixed staged payload; response handling is centralized through shared commit helpers.
evidence: BrightOwl 2761 inspected responsesForPreCommit centralization for explicit responses, auto-discovery, stale response reporting, and next steps.
BrightOwl 2761 confirmed the staged payload remains the same five VORCH-06 files with no duplicated alternate commit path.

conditions.message: The blank-evidence reward-hacking gap is fixed: bound pass validation now uses nonEmptyEvidence, so absent, blank, and whitespace-only evidence are rejected.
evidence: BrightOwl 2761 verified validateResponseCondition now checks len(nonEmptyEvidence(response.Evidence)) == 0 for bound pass verdicts.
BrightOwl 2761 verified the new blank pass evidence regression test and focused internal tests passed.

conditions.message: The changed blocker surface has direct regression coverage for whitespace-only evidence rejection, and the earlier auto-discovery/legacy/stale tests remain present.
evidence: ScarletMarsh 2760 inspected the new blank pass evidence rejected subtest using empty and whitespace-only evidence.
ScarletMarsh 2760 ran the focused internal, CLI, and E2E verifier/commit test commands in an isolated staged-slice worktree; all passed.

conditions.message: The blocker identified in message 2756 is addressed, and VORCH-06 now covers strict bound response binding, evidence-on-pass including blank evidence rejection, legacy override, stale guidance, and E2E begin-submit-commit flow.
evidence: BrightOwl 2761 verified implementation and test coverage for non-empty pass evidence.
BrightOwl 2761 ran focused internal, CLI, E2E, and full go test ./... in a clean staged snapshot; all passed.

conditions.message: Reverification evidence is recorded with the new hash, same payload scope, exact delta, and independent command results.
evidence: ScarletMarsh 2760 confirmed the reverify packet hash sha256:74c4... and manifest hash matched regenerated prompt output.
ScarletMarsh 2760 confirmed the staged payload remains the same five files and all requested focused tests passed.

conditions.message: Scope remains limited to the VORCH-06 commit auto-discovery/legacy compatibility payload; unrelated .beads changes and response logs are unstaged.
evidence: BrightOwl 2761 confirmed git status shows .beads/issues.jsonl and log/backpressure/responses as unstaged only.
BrightOwl 2761 confirmed git diff --cached is confined to the five VORCH-06 payload files.

conditions.message: The new delta does not add destructive behavior; prior destructive-operations pass remains valid for the new hash.
evidence: ScarletMarsh 2760 inspected the reverify delta and found only evidence validation and test assertion changes.
ScarletMarsh 2760 confirmed no new Git reset/checkout, force push, deploy, migration, external send, spend mutation, or production delete path was added.

conditions.message: Response evidence integrity is now enforced before artifact construction: blank bound pass evidence is rejected, while strict binding and stale response checks remain in place.
evidence: BrightOwl 2761 verified validateResponsesBinding still checks staged payload hash, manifest hash, condition ids, and condition file hashes.
BrightOwl 2761 verified bound response tests now cover nil pass evidence and blank/whitespace-only pass evidence rejection.

conditions.message: Prior security-boundaries pass remains valid: the fixed payload still only handles local response-file discovery/validation and does not add auth, network, secrets, or external API surfaces.
evidence: BrightOwl 2761 confirmed staged files are commit/backpressure artifacts code and tests only.
BrightOwl 2761 confirmed auto-discovery remains local to log/backpressure/responses/*.json and binding hashes are validated before acceptance.

conditions.message: Still no governed visual-regression surface in the new staged payload.
evidence: ScarletMarsh 2760 confirmed the new delta is bound evidence validation and Go test coverage only.
ScarletMarsh 2760 confirmed no browser UI, canvas, CSS, responsive layout, image, or visual-diff surface was added.

conditions.message: The new delta does not add performance cost beyond the previously inspected auto-discovery path; it only filters evidence strings during validation.
evidence: ScarletMarsh 2760 inspected validateResponseCondition calling nonEmptyEvidence for bound pass verdicts, bounded by the response evidence slice for one condition.
ScarletMarsh 2760 confirmed no new network calls, process fanout, broad repository walks, or unbounded filesystem scans were introduced.

conditions.message: The fix restores the intended boundary: commit cannot accept a bound independent-verifier pass cell with only blank evidence, so verifier evidence must be substantively present rather than merely claimed.
evidence: BrightOwl 2761 verified bound pass verdicts now require nonEmptyEvidence before commit validation passes.
BrightOwl 2761 verified the blank/whitespace-only evidence regression test and normal begin-submit-commit flow both pass.
